Description.en: A powered base for one of Cassia's towers.
Description.zh: 为卡西娅的防御塔准备的供能地基。

Description.en:
Damage: Low
Chills and Damages nearby enemies

Ineffective against Blighted Monsters of the same type
Description.zh:
伤害：低
对周围的敌人造成伤害和冰缓效果

对同类型的菌潮怪物无效

Description.en:
Increased Damage
Increased effect of Chill
Affects more Targets
Description.zh:
提高伤害
提高冰缓效果
影响更多目标

Description.en:
Increased Damage

Description.en:
Damage: Very High
Shoots a Piercing projectile which Freezes enemies

Ineffective against Blighted Monsters of the same type
Description.zh:
伤害：非常高
发射穿透敌人的投射物，并使其冻结

对同类型的菌潮怪物无效

Description.en:
Damage: Low
Repeats 3 times
Always Stuns
Damages and Stuns nearby Enemies

Ineffective against Blighted Monsters of the same type
Description.zh:
伤害：低
重复 3 次
必定晕眩
对周围的敌人造成伤害并使其晕眩

对同类型的菌潮怪物无效

Description.en: Repeats 5 times
Description.zh: 重复 5 次

Description.en: Repeats 7 times
Description.zh: 重复 7 次

Description.en:
Persistently Slows Monsters 
Does not Damage Enemies

Ineffective against Blighted Monsters of the same type
Description.zh:
持续使敌人减速

对同类型的菌潮怪物无效

Description.en:
Summons 3 Minions
Minion Damage: Low
Minion Life: Low
Can only summon Minions when previous Minions are dead

Ineffective against Blighted Monsters of the same type
Description.zh:
召唤 3 个生物
召唤生物伤害：低
召唤生物生命：低
只有之前的召唤生物被击败后才会召唤新的

对同类型的菌潮怪物无效

Description.zh: 召唤 5 个生物
